":{"book_id":"7457178473887452222","book_info":{"abstract":"【杀伐果断+天才修仙+炼气，筑基，金丹……老版修为体系】
我叫叶天，云剑宗圣子。
我天赋卓绝，两年筑基，五年结丹。
在我凡尘练心时，意外捡到一个同名人的逆转人生系统。
从此以后，我的修仙生活，开始变味。
什么！我堂堂金丹圆满，欺负一个普通凡人，这不能怪我，这是系统给的任务。
什么，我堂堂圣地圣子，去小门派当杂役。
嘘，你知道了，可千万别说出去，这还是系统给的任务。
什么，你问我堂堂圣地圣子，为何如此老六，喜欢扮猪吃老虎，专门欺负弱小？
嘘，我只告诉你一人，你可千万不要到处乱说。
我会如此老六，只因系统奖励太香了……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o703a6cf60545509f716f6748d2911e96~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乐观生活的小桃","author_id":"","book_id":"7457178473887452222","book_name":"我也不想做老六，只怪系统太香了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7457178851009905214","read_count":"32","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"123329"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"46","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,天才,扮猪吃虎,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o703a6cf60545509f716f6748d2911e96~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779298883&x-signature=Ax0G5Zqh%2FlW3Ndw4oIdzp%2FNF51k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3765148727390019","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"95"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032201412307CFA3FDA9B7E1585C60"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"
